# youtrack_enum_bundle (Resource)

YouTrack enum bundle resource. This resource manages sets of enum values.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "youtrack_enum_bundle" "priority" {
  name = "Priority"

  values = [
    {
      name = "Critical"
    },
    {
      name = "Major"
    },
    {
      name = "Normal"
    },
    {
      name = "Minor"
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The enum name.
- `values` (Attributes List) Ordered list of enum values. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the enum bundle.
- `is_updateable` (Boolean) Whether current user can update this bundle.

<a id="nestedatt--values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values`

Required:

- `name` (String) enum value name.

Optional:

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether this enum value is archived.
- `description` (String) enum value description.
- `localized_name` (String) Localized enum value name.

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) enum value ID.
- `ordinal` (Number) Position in the bundle.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import youtrack_enum_bundle.priority <ENUM_BUNDLE_ID>
```
